zh.Oranmore, Galway, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 高威奧拉莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught於大約1010年出生在愛爾蘭康瑙特時，他的父親Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht23歲，母親Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig0歲。他和Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain至少有6個兒子。他去世於1067年在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威奧拉莫享年58歲。

zh-hans.Oranmore, Galway, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 高威奧拉莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught于大约1010年出生在爱尔兰康瑙特时，他的父亲Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht23岁，母亲Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig0岁。他和Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain至少有6个儿子。他去世于1067年在爱尔兰庫迪 高威奧拉莫享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ó
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

meanings: form of John , also used extensively in the wider English-speaking world.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Gaí
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

variants.name: Gael
meanings: Fanciful spelling of Gail , also occasionally written Gaelle .

variants.name: Gaelle
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

variants.name: Gaile
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

variants.name: Gayle
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gail .  The popularity of this form was no doubt increased by the fame of the American film actress  Gayle Hunnicutt  (  b. 1943 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught was born about 1010, in Connaught, Ireland, his father, Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht, was 23 and his mother, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, was 0. He had at least 6 sons with Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain. He died in 1067, in Oranmore, County Galway, Ireland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught est né environ 1010, à Connaught, Irlande, son père, Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, avait 0 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain. Il est décédé en 1067, à Oranmore, County Galway, Irlande, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught um 1010 in Connaught, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht 23 und seine Mutter Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig 0. Er hatte mit Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1067 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Oranmore, County Galway, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught è nato il circa 1010 nel Connaught, Irlanda, il suo padre, Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, aveva 0 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain. Morì nel 1067, nel Oranmore, County Galway, Irlanda, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Galway Castle, Connaught, Ireland: アイルランドコナウト

ja.Connaught, Ireland: アイルランドコナウト
ja.lifeSummary: Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaughtが約1010年にアイルランドコナウトで生まれた時，父Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connachtは23歳，母Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraigは0歳であった。彼はCailleach Caimgein OFallamainとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1067年にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイオランモーで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught(이)가 대략 1010년 아일랜드 콘오그h트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig(은)는 0세였다. 그는 Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1067년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 오랜모어에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught nasceu aproximadamente 1010, em Connaught, Irlanda, seu pai, Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tinha 0 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain. Ele faleceu em 1067, em Oranmore, County Galway, Irlanda, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught родился около 1010 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, 0. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain. Он умер в 1067 г. в местности оранмор, коунти галвеи, Ирландия в возрасте 58 лет.

sm.from 1046 to 1067: mai le 1046 e o'o I le 1067

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught nació aproximadamente 1010, en Connaught, Irlanda, su papá, Tadg In Eich Gil Ua Conchobair King of Connacht, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tenía 0 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain. Murió en 1067, en Oranmore, County Galway, Irlanda, a la edad de 58 años.
